```{r}
PathToDataFolder <- file.path(getwd(), "course", "03_InsideFCSFile","homeworks", "chiaramori_dnnclr", "data")
```
```{r} 
fcs_files <- list.files(PathToDataFolder, pattern=".fcs", full.names=TRUE)
fcs_files
```
```{r}
library(dplyr) # CRAN
library(stringr) # CRAN
library(ggplot2) # CRAN
library(plotly) # Using the :: to access
library(flowCore) # Bioconductor
```
```{r}
